campaigns.name: AI Workflow Audits
campaigns.objective: Generate qualified demo requests from LinkedIn by positioning AI workflow audits as the de-risked path to production AI adoption
campaigns.targetAudience: Mid-market operations leaders (COOs, VPs of Operations, Directors of Digital Transformation) at $10M–$100M companies struggling to scale beyond AI pilots
campaigns.positioning: Enterprise-grade AI implementation without enterprise complexity — we connect AI to your existing stack rather than replacing it, with proven ROI within 90 days
keyMessages: Move from Pilot to Production: Cut Time-to-Value by 40%
AI Audits That Reveal Hidden ROI (Not Just Risks)
Integration-First AI: Connect to Your Existing Stack, Not Replace It
contentThemes: AI Adoption Reality Check — why 80% of AI pilots fail and how to beat the odds
Workflow Audit Playbooks — step-by-step AI readiness assessments and integration checklists
ROI Case Studies — specific operational cost savings with named metrics and timelines
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture with educational carousels and high-engagement opinion pieces
Phase 2: Consideration — nurture and educate with deep-dive case studies, ROI calculators, and webinar invitations
Phase 3: Conversion — demo requests and SQL handoff through LinkedIn Lead Gen Forms with progressive profiling
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture

infrastructure.funnelStrategy: Top-funnel awareness via LinkedIn organic content drives profile visits and checklist downloads (2-3 form fields) into a nurture sequence; mid-funnel educated prospects convert via higher-intent ROI calculator and webinar registrations (5-7 fields); bottom-funnel qualified leads with explicit budget/timeline convert via LinkedIn Lead Gen Forms (8-10 fields) to demo requests
conversionPaths: Primary conversion motion for high-intent prospects: LinkedIn Lead Gen Form directly to demo request with progressive profiling across funnel stages
Secondary path for education-first prospects: Content download → email nurture sequence → calendar link for workflow audit consultation
infrastructure.nurtureApproach: Trigger-based email sequences segmented by engagement behavior: website/demo page visitors receive 5-email demo request sequence; checklist downloaders receive 7-email education plus demo sequence; webinar registrants receive 5-email attendance plus conversion sequence; no-show demos receive 3-touch reschedule sequence

leadQualification.qualificationThreshold: 0-39 points: nurture; 40-59 points: MQL (48-hour outreach); 60-79 points: SQL (24-hour outreach); 80+ points: hot lead (1-hour outreach)
leadQualification.routingGuidance: Automated scoring in CRM triggers time-sensitive outreach workflow; MQLs receive 48-hour follow-up; SQLs receive 24-hour personal outreach from SDR; hot leads receive immediate SDR or AM contact

salesHandoff.owner: Account Executive receives qualified demand with full context packet
salesHandoff.process: CRM automation pushes qualified leads to AE queue with time-bounded SLA; AE reviews context packet within 24 hours and contacts lead within 1 hour for hot leads
requiredContext: Contact info (name, email, phone, authority level)
Company context (size, revenue, locations, pain points)
Engagement history (content downloaded, pages viewed, signals)
Pain point priorities (top 3 challenges from form or survey)

measurementPlan: Weekly review of LinkedIn follower growth and engagement rate
Monthly analysis of cost per qualified demo request by content theme
Quarterly audit of MQL→SQL conversion rate and time-to-qualification
